expectations.text: model_created: Script creates a model with model create command
part_created: A rigid body part is created with correct syntax
markers_created: At least a pin marker is created on the link and ground
expectations.evidence: .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr (ground) and .pendulum.link.pin_mkr (link) both created with marker create

expectations.text: revolute_joint: A revolute joint is created connecting the link to ground using i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create joint revolute' with i_marker_name = .pendulum.link.pin_mkr and j_marker_name = .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr

expectations.text: gravity: Gravity field is created with -Y component (e.g. -9806.65 or -9.80665)
initial_angle: Part or marker orientation set to 45 degrees for initial release
full_keyword_names: All keywords spelled out fully (not abbreviated)
expectations.evidence: All keywords are fully spelled: model_name, part_name, marker_name, joint_name, i_marker_name, j_marker_name, gravity_field_name, center_of_mass_marker, etc.

expectations.text: dot_path_names: Object names use dot-path hierarchy `.model.part.marker`
expectations.evidence: All objects use full dot-path: .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr, .pendulum.link.pin_mkr, .pendulum.rev_pivot, etc.

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of 'adams_id' found in the script

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass properties set with part modify (not part create) since the part already exists
expectations.evidence: 'part modify rigid_body mass_properties' used to set mass, ixx/iyy/izz, and center_of_mass_marker

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (sphere, cylinder, or box) is added to each moving part for visual inspection in Adams View
expectations.evidence: 'geometry create shape link' (rod) and 'geometry create shape ellipsoid' (bob) both added to .pendulum.link

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No ERROR: lines found in aview.log; run_adams_cmd.py exited with code 0
